statements.status_notes: CVE-2026-39821 affects golang.org/x/net before v0.55.0 (x/net/idna); the scanner flagged kubectl 1.36.2, which shipped golang.org/x/net v0.49.0. Fixed upstream: Kubernetes now vendors golang.org/x/net >= v0.55.0 (currently v0.55.1-0.20260602153038-42abb857022c), so the vulnerable version is no longer present. Related dependency bumps: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/pull/138561, https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/pull/139420. [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/140092]
